Class DefaultConstantEvaluator

java.lang.Object
recoder.AbstractService
recoder.service.DefaultConstantEvaluator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Service, ConstantEvaluator
public class DefaultConstantEvaluator extends AbstractService implements ConstantEvaluator
Easy constant folder to evaluate Java compile-time constants.

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ConstantEvaluator

    ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult

    Fields inherited from class AbstractService

    serviceConfiguration

    Create a new constant evaluator.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Type
    getCompileTimeConstantType(Expression expr)
    Returns the type of a constant expression if it is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification, or null if it is not.
    boolean
    isCompileTimeConstant(Expression expr)
    Checks if the given expression is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification.
    boolean
    isCompileTimeConstant(Expression expr, ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult res)
    Checks if the given expression is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification, and derives the result.

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultConstantEvaluator

      public DefaultConstantEvaluator(ServiceConfiguration config)
      Create a new constant evaluator.
      Parameters:
      config - the configuration this services becomes part of.

  • Method Details

    • getCompileTimeConstantType

      public Type getCompileTimeConstantType(Expression expr)
      Returns the type of a constant expression if it is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification, or null if it is not.
      Specified by:
      getCompileTimeConstantType in interface ConstantEvaluator
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to evaluate.
      Returns:
      the type of the expression, or null if the expression is not constant.

    • isCompileTimeConstant

      public boolean isCompileTimeConstant(Expression expr)
      Checks if the given expression is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification.
      Specified by:
      isCompileTimeConstant in interface ConstantEvaluator
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to evaluate.
      Returns:
      true, if the expression is a compile-time constant, false otherwise.

    • isCompileTimeConstant

      public boolean isCompileTimeConstant(Expression expr, ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult res)
      Checks if the given expression is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification, and derives the result.
      Specified by:
      isCompileTimeConstant in interface ConstantEvaluator
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to evaluate.
      res - the result of the evaluation; contains the type encoding and the result value.
      Returns:
      true, if the expression is a compile-time constant, false otherwise.
